summary: Added a generated-art Operator Identity Bay to the global roster so bot portraits, lane bindings, staged asks, spare expansion slots, and COM/ASSET/FORGE jumps are visible before individual operator cards.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium dark sci-fi agent portrait gallery and identity bay background with portrait pods, badge slots, lane-link conduits, expansion slots, teal/amber/violet glows, no text, no logos, and no faces.

ui_contract: Render the Operator Identity Bay before individual global operator roster cards.
Use generated operator-identity-bay-20260618.png as the reusable roster identity backdrop.
Derive active bot count, mapped portrait count, lane binding count, staged ask count, and spare expansion slots from existing snapshot/browser-local state.
Render a portrait strip from the existing agent roster avatars with lane-linked Comms drill-through.
Expose COM, ASSET, and FORGE actions through existing local-only detail, Asset Vault, Creator Kit, and Expansion Forge surfaces.
Register the identity-bay texture in the Visual Asset Vault system assets.
Keep animation transform/opacity-based and covered by reduced-motion handling.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_operator_identity_bay.py -q failed before implementation on missing operatorIdentityBayStats.
red_green.green: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_operator_identity_bay.py -q passed after generated asset, renderer, styles, docs, cache token, and Asset Vault wiring.

action_results: COM -> #lane=ai_ml_competitions&view=comms with Comms Command Room visible
ASSET -> agent Asset Vault filter with 11 visible portrait assets
FORGE -> Creator Kit / Expansion Forge area

responsive.evidence: All checked viewports rendered the Operator Identity Bay with generated backdrop, five stats, seven portrait tokens, three local actions, zero bad rects, zero button text overflow, zero page horizontal overflow, and zero console errors.
